# resend_domain (Resource)

Manages a Resend sending domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_domain" "example" {
  name   = "example.com"
  region = "us-east-1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The domain name (e.g., `example.com`).

### Optional

- `region` (String) AWS region for the domain (e.g., `us-east-1`).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the domain was created.
- `dkim_records` (Attributes List) DKIM records for domain verification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dkim_records))
- `id` (String) Domain identifier.
- `spf_mx_record` (Attributes) SPF MX record for domain verification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spf_mx_record))
- `spf_txt_record` (Attributes) SPF TXT record for domain verification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spf_txt_record))
- `status` (String) Domain verification status.

<a id="nestedatt--dkim_records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dkim_records`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) DNS record hostname.
- `record` (String) Record purpose (e.g., `SPF`, `DKIM`).
- `status` (String) Verification status of this record.
- `ttl` (String) Time to live.
- `type` (String) DNS record type (e.g., `MX`, `TXT`, `CNAME`).
- `value` (String) DNS record value.


<a id="nestedatt--spf_mx_record"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spf_mx_record`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) DNS record hostname.
- `priority` (String) MX record priority.
- `record` (String) Record purpose (e.g., `SPF`, `DKIM`).
- `status` (String) Verification status of this record.
- `ttl` (String) Time to live.
- `type` (String) DNS record type (e.g., `MX`, `TXT`, `CNAME`).
- `value` (String) DNS record value.


<a id="nestedatt--spf_txt_record"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spf_txt_record`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) DNS record hostname.
- `record` (String) Record purpose (e.g., `SPF`, `DKIM`).
- `status` (String) Verification status of this record.
- `ttl` (String) Time to live.
- `type` (String) DNS record type (e.g., `MX`, `TXT`, `CNAME`).
- `value` (String) DNS record value.
